candidates.claim: Build/validate the genome world model on INTERVENTIONAL (edit->measure) data — DMS + marker-transfer fold-change — because observational isolate data is phylogeny-confounded BY CONSTRUCTION; the catalog wins precisely because each entry encodes interventional (site-directed) knowledge.
evidence: [grounded] ProteinGym ESM2-650M median Spearman 0.484 on interventional DMS
[inferred] the observational-vs-interventional split is the deepest explanation of the same-way failure

candidates.claim: Turn the de-confounding machinery INTO the product: a phylogeny-removed RESIDUAL-SIGNAL detector that reports which genome regions carry mechanism signal BEYOND lineage (parents: DEAD-END-A embeddings-learn-phylogeny x ASSET-5 Mash-clade de-confounding).
evidence: [grounded] crossaxis determinant clade-grouped AUC 0.908 (signal survives phylogeny removal)
[grounded] naive AUC 0.975 vs clade-grouped 0.908 => most-but-not-all signal is beyond lineage

candidates.claim: NAIVE g5 (KILLED by a deeper kill-test 2026-07-13): extend the catalog with an ADDITIVE accessory-mutation rule and it will net-IMPROVE the decoder.
evidence: [grounded] catalog+accessory improves=false on committed leave-study-out HIV data (delta_bal_acc -0.006; sens 0.864->0.908 but spec 0.783->0.727)
[grounded] the shallow blind-spots-exist precondition could not distinguish this — the deeper net-improvement test does

candidates.claim: REFINED g5 (SURVIVOR): the catalog-extension's real value is a SELF-AWARENESS position-novelty FLAG ('the catalog call may be incomplete here'), NOT a sensitivity-boosting additive rule — because adding accessory mutations trades away specificity.
evidence: [grounded] position-novelty flag verdict FLAG_RECOVERS_BLINDSPOT, median lift 3.98, median sens-on-blindspot 0.604 (committed)
[grounded] 53 catalog-negative resistant HIV isolates exist (the flag has real blind spots to flag)
[inferred] a self-awareness flag improves TRUST without the spec cost that killed the additive rule

candidates.claim: Reframe the 'genome world model' as a FEDERATION of de-confounded deterministic cells + calibrated abstention + the genome-map honesty layer — a composed, auditable system — NOT a single monolithic learned model.
evidence: [grounded] 10 provenance-disjoint SCORED cells already exist, lineage-disclosed
[grounded] genome-map honesty report + calibrated abstention already shipped
[inferred] composition-with-abstention is a different PRODUCT than a monolith (necessary-condition test only)

candidates.claim: CONTROL (tempting-but-wrong): scale the whole-genome/protein embedding to 3B/15B to finally learn the mechanism where 650M failed.

The catalog blind spot is an OBJECTIVE problem, not capacity: likelihood/exchangeability scorers (ESM, BLOSUM62) call conservative substitutions benign by construction, so a model trained to predict FUNCTIONAL CHANGE on interventional DMS at the exact conserved DRM sites could fill the blind spot.
evidence: [grounded] BLOSUM62 ties ESM on DRM ranking (mid-rank 4.5 vs 4.0) => likelihood objective is the shared blind spot
[speculative] a function-trained objective at those sites separates them (UNTESTED — no committed function-DMS overlap)

candidates.claim: Relax 'labels must be FREE wet-lab' -> use computational structure-based ddG / docking predicted fold-change as a WEAK bootstrap label to seed census cells that lack a free wet-lab label (independent-but-simulated, not free-observed).
evidence: [grounded] DMS (a measured interventional label) already works in-repo
[speculative] COMPUTATIONAL ddG correlates with real fold-change above a usable threshold (UNTESTED — no committed ddG artifact)
